nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable implementer requiring oversight
nodes.grounding_span: I will use it as a pair programmer to refine technical implementation details, then oversee and monitor its implementation

nodes.label: AI up-to-date knowledge
nodes.label_negative: AI providing outdated or false information
nodes.grounding_span: the model will present information in the technical implementation plan that is simply not true

nodes.label: AI as tool for market and business perspective
nodes.grounding_span: I use it more as an advanced researching tool to determine market data/statistics and options for different approaches

nodes.label: AI delegation for simple tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI as skill replacement leading to dependency
nodes.grounding_span: The skills I am 'leasing out' to LLMs are things I am both confident in my ability to do on my own and comfortable with doing on my own if need be

nodes.label: AI trustworthiness and verification
nodes.grounding_span: I do not currently trust agentic LLMs to handle tasks unsupervised

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: This is a way for me to save time and energy

nodes.label: Business insight and strategic understanding
nodes.grounding_span: There are valuable business insights to be found in such things that would allow us to better align our services and products to our customers

nodes.label: Ownership and understanding of work
nodes.grounding_span: I am the one driving the research, ideation and actual business

nodes.label: Frustration with outdated information
nodes.grounding_span: A strong gripe I have with coding-specific LLM's is that they do not have the habit of checking documentation

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as delegated employee
nodes.grounding_span: This is a way for me to save time and energy

nodes.label: Skepticism and caution toward AI
nodes.grounding_span: I do not currently trust agentic LLMs to handle tasks unsupervised

nodes.label: Systematic verification through source checking
nodes.grounding_span: With more abstract suggestions or business-crucial suggestions, I will check myself. I won't bother to check minor things

nodes.label: Pragmatic delegation with fallback confidence
nodes.grounding_span: I am a proficient coder on my own, and if that skill becomes dull and LLMs suddenly vanish, it would be a small and simple thing to simply relearn
